<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Event\TestRunner; use PHPUnit\Event\Event; use PHPUnit\Event\Telemetry; /** * @immutable * * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class Finished implements Event { private Telemetry\Info $telemetryInfo; public function __construct(Telemetry\Info $telemetryInfo) { $this->telemetryInfo = $telemetryInfo; } public function telemetryInfo(): Telemetry\Info { return $this->telemetryInfo; } public function asString(): string { return 'Test Runner Finished'; } }
